yogurt-lemon-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Yogurt Lemon Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: Powder sugar or lemon slices Home for optionally uniform
Instead of plain yogurt, you can use cottage yogurt; cake gets more and creamy texture.
You can get a vegan or lighter cake using vegetable yogurts (badem, peels, nuts or coconut yoğurdu).
You can use butter or melted margarine instead of liquid oil; cake gains more aromatic and dense taste.
Lighter alternative to olive oil (lightly flavored) or sunflower oil can be preferred.
Instead of powder sugar, you can get a light lethal aroma using brunette sugar.
Avine selectforek for honey, maple you can taste it with snacks or agave snacks; the texture of cake gets slightly more humid.
You can change the lemon peel and water with orange or lime; it gives a different citrus flavor to the dessert.
Lemon peel instead of citrus flavored vanilla or a few drops of citrus extract it also provides light aroma.
Instead of normal flour you can use full wheat flour or almond flour; it gives the full wheat flour more dense and fiber texture, almond flour is lighter and aromatic.
You can choose a gluten-free flour mixture of a cake i&ccedil without gluten.
Package vanilin instead of vanilla extract or use bar vanilla strengthens the aromatic profile of cake.
You can add white frecolate or lemony glaze instead of cake u powder sugar.
You can enrich the presentation by serving fresh fruits, creams or with a ball ice cream.

yogurt-soup-with-cucumber-argiro.name: Yogurt Soup With Cucumber

ingredients.item: Few leaves of mint and flower
Few leaves of mint and flower

instructions: Wash the cucumbers, cut them along and, if they have many seeds, remove them with a spoon.
Then cut them into frame and put them in the blender's bowl.
Add the yoghurt, mint, dill, salt and pepper and mash the ingredients until we have a smooth, homogeneous mixture.
If you prefer the soup thinner, add some water and mix.
Leave the cold soup in the refrigerator to cool until serving.
Transfer to frozen bowls and serve as a light meal, sprinkle with some olive oil, chopped tomatoes and mint and flower leaves.
